title: Oil Climbs After Fresh Trump Threat as US-Iran Peace Talks Begin
summary: Oil gained after President Donald Trump threatened strikes on Iran if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel, raising concerns about progress for peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

title: US, Iran Meet in Switzerland as Trump Threatens Iran
summary: The US and Iran began talks in Switzerland on a peace deal to settle the issue of the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program as President Donald Trump once again threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel. Bloomberg's Wendy Benjaminson has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion

Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion 
Prediction market giant Kalshi is exploring a potential IPO for 2027 or 2028 after annualized revenue surpassed $2 billion.

title: Inception Labs' Mercury 2 AI Beats Google's DiffusionGemma at Its Own Game
summary: Both models trade word-by-word generation for parallel denoising. Only one of them does it without losing intelligence in the trade.

title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
summary: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.

title: Polymarket paid creators to stage fake winning bets on dummy sites: WSJ
summary: The Journal reviewed more than 1,100 videos and found none of the roughly $1.9 million in bets shown in influencer-produced hype videos were real.

title: Fentanyl-linked Chinese network tied to crypto fraud from Japan involving fake ‘Zksync.jp’ token: Nikkei
summary: The linked criminal group allegedly distributed a scam token under the name "zksync.jp" to deceive crypto users worldwide, with losses of over $1 million.

summary: Oil prices rise as Trump threatens new strikes if Tehran does not rein in Hizbollah in Lebanon

title: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
summary: Trump-selected Fed chair Kevin Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does. Past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.

title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
summary: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity
